heroHeadline: 5,300 Years of Pakistan: Indus Valley to Modern Governance Crisis
heroSubtitle: From Mohenjo-daro to Islamabad — tracking one of the world's oldest continuous civilizations through partition, military coups, nuclear tests, and 24 IMF bailouts.
footerNote: Data sourced from official government records (Government of Pakistan, ECP, SBP, ISPR), major news outlets (Dawn, Reuters, AP, BBC), academic institutions, and international organizations (UN, IMF, World Bank, SIPRI, HRCP).
